AddressInfo.Title: AC at Fairview Hotel (Tzaneen)
AddressInfo.Town: Old Grave;otte Road Limpopo Manorvlei Farm Extention 8

GeneralComments:
airview Hotel is the perfect base from which to explore the Tzaneen area, Magoebaskloof, Haenertsburg and surrounding areas. Activities are endless… from scenic hiking trails, boat trips on the Tzaneen and Ebenezer dams, bird watching in the indigenous forests, a game of golf, treetop canopy tours, township experiences, or just to relax at one of the two sparkling swimming pools set in the lush indigenous gardens with abundant birdlife.
